name: Feature Request

## Pre-submission Checklist

- [ ] I have checked that this feature is **not already present in the [latest build of Datarium](https://github.com/TheSlize/Datarium/releases/latest)**.

---

## Feature Description

<!-- A clear and concise description of what you want to be added or changed. Explain *what* is missing and *why* it would be useful. -->


## Problem / Motivation

<!-- Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe it. E.g. "I can't do X because..." -->


## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe how you'd like the feature to work. Be as specific as possible. -->

<!-- Does this feature exist in Minecraft 1.20 or 1.21 (either in vanilla or in a mod)? If so, name the mod(s) or vanilla mechanic and briefly describe how it works there. This helps understand the reference implementation. -->
